final:
module top_module(
    input  wire [63:0] x,
    input  wire [79:0] k,
    output wire [63:0] r
);assign r = x ^ k[79:16];  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      r <= ~x; if (k[15]) begin r <= x & k[79:16]; end
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_dead_stmts: r <= ~x; if (k[15]) begin r <= x & k[79:16]; end
